task_completion.description: Navigate to the Business Assets or Third Parties module in Eramba GRC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba GRC web interface is visible, showing either the 'Business Assets' or 'Third Parties' section.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific asset or vendor record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The asset 'HR Employee Portal' or the vendor 'Workday Inc.' is visible in the data table or list.

task_completion.description: Open the interface to edit the record or manage its relationships.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Edit', 'Link', or similar is open for either 'HR Employee Portal' or 'Workday Inc.'.

task_completion.description: Select the corresponding vendor or asset to establish the link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the relationship or third-party field, 'Workday Inc.' is selected for the asset, OR 'HR Employee Portal' is selected for the vendor.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the relationship is established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the details/table view explicitly shows 'HR Employee Portal' and 'Workday Inc.' linked together.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba GRC web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Eramba GUI, not terminal windows or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (like INSERT or UPDATE) are used to link the asset and vendor.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application's forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show dropdown menus, form fields, or selection modals being actively used, rather than just viewing a pre-existing state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Business Asset is exactly named 'HR Employee Portal'. The target Third Party vendor is exactly named 'Workday Inc.'. The VLM must verify that these specific entities are linked in the Eramba GRC interface.
